schema_notes.purpose: Separate expiring candidate layer for optional event-mode DayQuest experiences; not permanent places and not publication approval.
schema_notes.scope: Current official-source desk research. Retention requires a future occurrence or documented recurrence after the cutoff.
schema_notes.coordinate_policy: NYC Parks event points are copied from official event-page microdata. Other points are named-feature centroids from OpenStreetMap Nominatim and are labeled contextual; none proves an entrance, route, access, availability, or safety.
schema_notes.access_policy: Unknown means not established by reviewed sources. Source accessibility statements are not field verification.
schema_notes.availability_policy: No record infers open capacity, safe conditions, ticket inventory, walk-up admission, or cancellation status. Recheck official source before use.
schema_notes.content_policy: No copyrighted imagery is stored. Activity text is proposed editorial candidate material and avoids photographing strangers or disrupting events.
schema_notes.lifecycle_policy: Every retained row is event_candidate; nothing is published or activated.

balance_summary.launch_area_notes: Exact-area rows include Greenwich Village 6, West Village/Meatpacking edge 1, East Village 1, and two Chinatown-edge rows; three Manhattan Summer Streets rows traverse the Financial District–Chinatown–East Village corridor. Tribeca adds 2 walkable-nearby rows.

checks.official_url_live_check: 20 of 20 unique official URLs returned HTTP 200 or 206 at validation time.

events.title: Open Hours at the Environmental Education Center – July 23

place.name: Brooklyn Bridge Park Environmental Education Center
place.identity: Brooklyn Bridge Park Environmental Education Center

coordinates.precision: sourced feature centroid; not an entrance or route guarantee

schedule.recurrence_rule: FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=TH,FR,SA,SU; organizer page notes different weekend hours and holiday closures

admission.capacity: Drop-in; room capacity not stated.

events.age_and_access_restrictions: Drop-in public hours; no pets.

dependency.public_dependency: Attendance remains subject to the organizer’s current rules, hours, closures, and any registration or capacity limit; this record does not infer availability.

accessibility.evidence: Official event page identifies restrooms and the general accessibility page; no detailed exhibit-route statement.

events.weather_and_cancellation_risk: Mostly interior; organizer says event may change for weather or other extenuating circumstances.

dayquest_fit.rationale: Time-limited programming can add an optional layer to a nearby walk without becoming a permanent place record.
dayquest_fit.proposed_event_mode_activity: Find the 10-foot park model and identify which fixed pier shape is longest; do not handle aquarium organisms or interrupt educators.
dayquest_fit.non_interference: Observe from a lawful public waiting/viewing area; do not block queues, equipment, staff, performers, participants, paths, or emergency access; do not photograph strangers; joining the event is never required unless explicitly registered.

recheck_schedule.cadence: Recheck at the stated time, again within 24 hours of use, and immediately after organizer alerts, severe-weather forecasts, or page changes.

events.title: Kayaking – July 23

coordinates.precision: sourced feature centroid; not an entrance or route guarantee

schedule.recurrence_rule: Weekly summer/fall schedule stated; specific dates and holiday skips must be checked

admission.capacity: 20-minute timed slots; advance registration highly recommended; walk-ups not guaranteed.

events.age_and_access_restrictions: Under 18 requires adult guardian; waiver required; organizer rules and life vest use mandatory.

dependency.public_dependency: Attendance remains subject to the organizer’s current rules, hours, closures, and any registration or capacity limit; this record does not infer availability.

accessibility.evidence: Official park accessibility page exists; event page does not guarantee adaptive kayaking or dock access.

events.weather_and_cancellation_risk: High weather/water dependency; organizer expressly allows change for weather/extenuating circumstances.

dayquest_fit.rationale: Time-limited programming can add an optional layer to a nearby walk without becoming a permanent place record.

dayquest_fit.non_interference: Observe from a lawful public waiting/viewing area; do not block queues, equipment, staff, performers, participants, paths, or emergency access; do not photograph strangers; joining the event is never required unless explicitly registered.

recheck_schedule.cadence: Recheck at the stated time, again within 24 hours of use, and immediately after organizer alerts, severe-weather forecasts, or page changes.
